description: Four BT4 Colossal Warfare prints depict Time Breakers / Time-Breaker-thrall affiliates and belong on the xenoverse-villains roster. BT4-114 Gravy-in-Demigra's-Thrall, BT4-116 Putine-in-Demigra's-Thrall, and BT4-117 Time-Trauma Masked Saiyan all carry the canonical *in-Demigra's-thrall* / *Time-Trauma* in-name suffix that mechanically marks Time-Breaker dark-energy mind-control corruption per the existing xenoverse-villains node's Towa-as-apparatus-of-corruption thesis. BT4-113 Gravy-Lightning's-Might is Gravy's base-form pre-thrall depiction; affiliation here flows via *character continuity* (same Gravy whose BT4-114 print is canonically Demigra-thralled) rather than direct visual Time-Breaker iconography on the BT4-113 art itself. The BT4 Colossal Warfare Time-Breaker subarchetype expands from 6 to 10 corpus anchors with this wiring. BT4-117 Time-Trauma Masked Saiyan's suspected-IP is canonically Bardock-under-Towa's-mask per Xenoverse-canon (a corpus suspected_ip flag already in place), surfacing a future bardock solo node candidate (deferred — out of scope this wave per one-new-node-per-invocation rule, Mr. Nodeley budget consumed by E2 bulma).
citations: [Dragon Ball Wiki: Masked Saiyan — Bardock-under-Towa's-mask Xenoverse-canon entry]
[dbs-cardgame.com — BT4 Colossal Warfare design concept page] — already-canonical citation in existing BT4-107 trivia + xenoverse-villains node body
[Card-name in-Demigra's-thrall suffix in BT4-114 + BT4-116] — first-party Bandai mechanical signal of Time-Breaker corruption

anchor_count_audit.note: xenoverse-villains parent-cohort node now anchors 11 corpus prints across BT3 + SD3 + BT4 — solidly above three-anchor cohort-establishment threshold; solo-Mira split candidate strengthens (SD3-05 + BT4-110 + Mira-Leader-locked BT4-121 = 3 Mira-coded prints) and could trigger separate Nodeley pass

two_way_diff_audit.drift_check: appears_on entries === card characters: pointers (both will reference xenoverse-villains in matched mirror)

out_of_scope_flags.trigger: BT4-117 Time-Trauma Masked Saiyan suspected_ip explicitly names Bardock-under-Towa's-mask (Dragon Ball Xenoverse) — canonical Xenoverse storyline corrupts the Saiyan-saga-pre-Goku-father figure Bardock as a Time-Breaker thrall via Towa's mask apparatus
out_of_scope_flags.anchor_count_in_corpus: unverified — requires bbl_node_audit corpus scan for any Bardock-named or Bardock-coded prints; if ≥3 prints exist, threshold-met for solo node
out_of_scope_flags.action: defer to dedicated bardock-character-node Nodeley pass (out of scope this wave, Mr. Nodeley budget consumed by E2 bulma)

topology_note: Branch shape (one canonical node fans out to four new card anchors). Edgelord defers to Mr. Nodeley's domain here — fanouts blueball Edgelord but the wiring is structurally correct for the parent-cohort character node.
